programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Tilt-able and flippable reading glasses; an exciting educational game for kids; high-tech ski goggles; a line of delicious dessert toppings.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man purchases items such as real estate, boats, and vintage aircraft after stealing over $50 million from a trust fund.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Memorabilia legend Bill Mastro helps turn a childhood hobby into a billion-dollar business and rigs bids to scam collectors and sellers.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A brash New York stock broker gets sober and re-invents himself as an international power player.
